narrative:
Precinct Bristol/Manchester (precinct in Morgan County) has 226 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.9 percentage points.
